playStyleDescriptions.Balanced: Keeps your team measured in and out of possession, with a steady shape and fewer extremes.
playStyleDescriptions.Attacking: Pushes more bodies forward, creates extra support around the box, and asks your team to take more initiative.
playStyleDescriptions.Defensive: Makes your team protect space first, stay compact, and reduce the risk of getting exposed behind the ball.
playStyleDescriptions.Possession: Encourages your team to circulate the ball patiently, control the tempo, and look for cleaner openings.
playStyleDescriptions.Counter: Invites your team to break forward quickly after regaining the ball, attacking space before the opponent resets.
playStyleDescriptions.HighPress: Asks your team to close down earlier, win the ball higher up the pitch, and keep opponents under pressure.

tactics.rolesHint: Choose your leadership hierarchy and dead-ball specialists from the current Starting XI.
tactics.noStartersForRoles: Set your starting XI to assign team roles and set pieces.
tactics.pitchInteractionHint: Drag players between the pitch and bench, click one player to inspect them, click a second player to compare them, then confirm the swap in the compare panel.
tactics.selectSecondPlayer: Select a second player in the lineup view to compare attributes and prepare the swap.
tactics.compareSelectionHint: Review both players below, then confirm the swap when you're ready.
tactics.selectPitchPlayer: Select a player in the lineup view to inspect their attributes.
tactics.selectAnotherToSwap: Select a second player to compare them and confirm the swap.

training.recoveryNote: Players will focus on rest and condition recovery on all days.
training.trainingAppliedNote: Training is applied on scheduled training days when you advance time. Rest days provide full recovery.

staffAdvice.critical: Fitness crisis! {{criticalCount}} player(s) in critical condition. {{scheduleAdvice}}
staffAdvice.ok: Squad fitness is high. You could switch to Balanced or Intense for more development.

scheduleAdvice.criticalIntense: Switch to a Balanced or Light schedule immediately.
scheduleAdvice.criticalBalanced: Consider a Light schedule or Recovery focus.
scheduleAdvice.criticalLight: Set focus to Recovery until fitness improves.
scheduleAdvice.warnIntense: A Balanced schedule would give more recovery time.
scheduleAdvice.warnBalanced: A Light schedule could help the squad bounce back.
scheduleAdvice.warnLight: Recovery focus would maximise fitness recovery.

Low.label: Low
Low.desc: Gentle session — less fatigue, slower growth

High.label: High
High.desc: Intense drills — faster growth, more fatigue

Intense.label: Intense
Intense.detail: Maximum player development. Only Sunday off. Risk of fatigue buildup.

Balanced.label: Balanced
Balanced.detail: Train Mon, Tue, Thu, Fri. Rest Wed, Sat, Sun. Recommended for most squads.

Light.label: Light
Light.detail: Train Tue & Thu only. Prioritises recovery. Good after heavy fixture congestion.

groups.trainingGroupsDesc: Assign players to groups with different training focuses. Ungrouped players use the team default.
groups.noGroups: No training groups created. Add a group and assign players to customise their training.

staff.noStaffMatch: No staff members match your filters.

finances.facilityScoutingEffect: Improves scouting quality and information depth.
finances.sponsorPitchDescription: Ask the commercial team to chase a short-term sponsor deal for clubs under financial pressure.
finances.marketingCampaignDescription: Push a one-off merchandise and outreach campaign for an immediate cash boost when the club is under pressure.

finances.marketingCampaignSummary: Campaign netted {{netIncome}} after {{cost}} in spend ({{grossRevenue}} gross). Cooldown: {{days}} days.

finances.boardSupportDescription: Ask the board for emergency funding to stabilize cash flow. This hurts confidence and usually tightens the transfer budget.
finances.boardSupportUnavailable: Board support is reserved for clubs in debt or facing an imminent cash crunch.
finances.boardSupportSummary: Board approved {{amount}} in emergency funding. Transfer budget reduced by {{transferBudgetReduction}} and board confidence fell by {{satisfactionPenalty}}.

transfers.bidImpactOverBalance: This bid would push the club into debt
transfers.bidCountered: They came back with revised terms.
transfers.counterCountered: They pushed back with a lower number.
transfers.negotiationExpiredError: Talks cooled off before you could answer. Start a new negotiation if the club comes back.
transfers.resumeNegotiationHint: Talks are still live with this club.
transfers.resumeNegotiationHeadline: The other club are waiting for your next move.
transfers.transferFeedbackAcceptedHeadline: The other club are ready to do business.
transfers.transferFeedbackAcceptedDetail: Your number landed inside their comfort zone, so the conversation moved quickly.
transfers.transferFeedbackCounterHeadline: They want more before shaking hands.
transfers.transferFeedbackCounterDetail: The bid was close enough to keep talking, but their side are signalling a price nearer {{fee}}.
transfers.transferFeedbackRejectedDetail: The proposal did not move them enough. You would need a stronger fee, closer to {{fee}}, to reopen serious talks.

players.showingFirst: Showing first {{shown}} of {{total}} players. Refine your search to see more.

news.newsWillAppear: News will appear as the season progresses.

playerProfile.renewalBudgetWarning: Offer exceeds the board wage pressure limit
playerProfile.renewalBlocked: Talks are blocked after your earlier decision
playerProfile.renewalCooledOff: Previous talks cooled off, so this starts as a fresh conversation.
playerProfile.terminateContractBody: Release {{name}} immediately and pay the remaining contracted wages as severance.
playerProfile.terminationUnsafe: This release would leave the squad unable to field a matchday XI.
playerProfile.renewalDelegateMissingReport: Assistant report did not include this player.
playerProfile.renewalFeedbackCalmDetail: This is mostly a business conversation for now. Timing matters, but the relationship is not under real strain yet.
playerProfile.renewalFeedbackFirmHeadline: They want stronger terms before moving.
playerProfile.renewalFeedbackFirmDetail: The discussion is still open, but wage level and contract length need to feel clearly worthwhile from their side.
playerProfile.renewalFeedbackTenseDetail: Low trust, low morale, or contract pressure are making the camp push hard. Another weak offer could shut the door.
playerProfile.renewalFeedbackAcceptedHeadline: They liked the package and moved quickly.
playerProfile.renewalFeedbackAcceptedDetail: The offer landed close enough to their expectations, so the talks stayed constructive.
playerProfile.renewalFeedbackAcceptedLateHeadline: They accepted, but there was not much patience left.
playerProfile.renewalFeedbackAcceptedLateDetail: You got the deal done after a tougher exchange. Their side were close to walking away from the discussion.
playerProfile.renewalFeedbackBlockedHeadline: They are not reopening the conversation yet.
playerProfile.renewalFeedbackBlockedDetail: Your earlier stance is still shaping the mood here, so their camp will not engage again for now.

pressReport.bodyIntro: Speaking after the {{result}} result, the {{team}} manager addressed the press.
pressReport.bodyOutro: The conference covered the result, tactical approach, and what lies ahead for the team.
pressReport.bodySingle: The {{team}} manager spoke briefly after the {{result}} result.
pressReport.bodyNone: The {{team}} manager declined to speak at length after the {{result}} result.

questions.win: A strong result today, {{userScore}}-{{oppScore}} against {{oppName}}. How pleased are you with the performance?
questions.loss: A tough result today, losing {{userScore}}-{{oppScore}} to {{oppName}}. What went wrong out there?
questions.draw: A {{userScore}}-{{oppScore}} draw against {{oppName}}. Is that a fair result?

humble.text: The players worked hard. We prepared well and executed the game plan.

confident.text: We were the better side from start to finish. A deserved result.

deflect.text: It's just three points. We move on to the next one.

accept.text: We weren't good enough today. We have to look at what went wrong.

defiant.text: I don't think we deserved to lose. We created enough chances.

deflect.text: I'd rather not dwell on it. We'll be ready for the next match.

fair.text: It was a fair result. Both teams had chances.

frustrated.text: We should have won that. Too many missed opportunities.

positive.text: A point is a point. There are positives to take from today.

questions.scored: {{playerName}} scored today. How important is their contribution to the team?
questions.default: Can you comment on {{playerName}}'s performance today?

praise.text: {{playerName}} has been fantastic. They're a key player for us and their work rate is exemplary.

demanding.text: {{playerName}} can do better. I expect more from a player of their quality.

deflect.text: I don't like to single out individuals. It's a team game.

tactics.question: Can you talk us through your tactical approach today?

detailed.text: We set up to control the midfield and use our width. I think the shape worked well.

brief.text: We had a plan and the players executed it. That's all that matters.

evasive.text: I'd rather not give away too much. Every team has their secrets.

questions.win: The fans were in great voice today. What does their support mean to you?
questions.loss: Some fans voiced frustration at full time. Do you have a message for them?
questions.draw: The atmosphere was tense at times today. How do you manage that pressure?

grateful.text: The fans are incredible. They drive us forward every match and we owe them performances like today.

shared.text: We all celebrate together — players, staff, and supporters. This is their victory too.

deflect.text: The fans know what we're about. We just focus on the pitch.

apologize.text: I understand their frustration completely. They deserve better and we'll work hard to deliver.

patience.text: I ask for patience. We're building something and bad days happen. We'll come back stronger.

curt.text: I won't comment on things said in the heat of the moment. Let's move on.

appreciate.text: I appreciate every single supporter who comes to watch us. Their energy lifts the team.

understand.text: They want to see us win and so do I. We'll keep pushing until the results come.

curt.text: I don't get involved with what happens in the stands. My focus is on the pitch.

ahead.question: What's your focus going into the next match?

focused.text: Recovery first, then preparation. We take it one game at a time.

ambitious.text: We want to keep building momentum. The target is clear.

curt.text: Next question, please. We'll worry about that when it comes.

world.randomDescription: Randomly generated league with {{teamCount}} teams across Europe
world.exportedDescription: World with {{teamCount}} teams exported from saved game

welcome.body0:
The board of directors at {{team}} is delighted to welcome you as the new manager.

We have high hopes for your tenure and believe you can lead this club to glory. Your first task will be to review the squad and prepare a tactical plan for the upcoming season.

We wish you the best of luck.
welcome.body1:
On behalf of the entire {{team}} family, we are thrilled to announce your appointment as manager.

The fans are eager to see your vision for the team. Please take time to assess the squad, review our financial position, and set your tactical approach.

The board stands behind you.
welcome.body2:
Welcome to {{team}}! The supporters and staff are excited about the future under your guidance.

We recommend you start by reviewing your squad's strengths and weaknesses, then set up your preferred formation and training regime.

The upcoming season will be a true test — make us proud.

schedule.subject: Season Schedule Released
schedule.body0:
The {{league}} schedule has been released. The season kicks off on {{start}}.

Review the fixture list and ensure your squad is ready for the challenges ahead. Pre-season preparation will be crucial.
schedule.body1:
Fixture list confirmed! The {{league}} season begins on {{start}}.

Study the opening fixtures carefully — a strong start can set the tone for the whole campaign. Make sure your key players are match-fit.

preMatch.subject: Upcoming: vs {{opponent}} ({{venue}})
preMatch.body0:
Your {{venue}} match against {{opponent}} is coming up on {{matchDate}}.

Matchday {{matchday}} of the Premier Division. Make sure your starting XI is in good shape and your tactics are set.

Make the most of playing at {{venue}}.
preMatch.body1:
Reminder: you face {{opponent}} {{venue}} on {{matchDate}}.

This is Matchday {{matchday}} — review your squad fitness and consider any tactical adjustments.
preMatch.body0Home:
Your home match against {{opponent}} is coming up on {{matchDate}}.

Matchday {{matchday}} of the Premier Division. Make sure your starting XI is in good shape and your tactics are set.

Home advantage could be key in this one.
preMatch.body0Away:
Your away match against {{opponent}} is coming up on {{matchDate}}.

Matchday {{matchday}} of the Premier Division. Make sure your starting XI is in good shape and your tactics are set.

Matching their intensity away from home could be key in this one.
preMatch.body1Home:
Reminder: you face {{opponent}} at home in 3 days ({{matchDate}}).

This is Matchday {{matchday}} — review your squad fitness and consider any tactical adjustments. The fans will be behind you at home.
preMatch.body1Away:
Reminder: you face {{opponent}} away in 3 days ({{matchDate}}).

This is Matchday {{matchday}} — review your squad fitness and consider any tactical adjustments. Away form will be tested — pack your strongest lineup.

body.victory0:
Full time: {{home}} {{homeGoals}} - {{awayGoals}} {{away}}.

An excellent result! The team put in a strong performance. Matchday {{matchday}} — keep this momentum going.
body.victory1:
Final whistle: {{home}} {{homeGoals}} - {{awayGoals}} {{away}}.

Three points in the bag! The lads showed great character out there. Matchday {{matchday}} complete.
body.defeat0:
Full time: {{home}} {{homeGoals}} - {{awayGoals}} {{away}}.

A disappointing result. We'll need to regroup and work on the areas that let us down. Matchday {{matchday}} — there's still time to turn things around.
body.defeat1:
Final score: {{home}} {{homeGoals}} - {{awayGoals}} {{away}}.

Not the result we wanted. Matchday {{matchday}} — the board will want to see improvement. Review what went wrong and prepare for the next challenge.
body.draw:
Full time: {{home}} {{homeGoals}} - {{awayGoals}} {{away}}.

A point earned in Matchday {{matchday}}. Depending on results elsewhere, this could be valuable. The team fought hard but couldn't find a winner.

staffAdvice.subject: Staff Report — Coaching Vacancies
staffAdvice.body:
Boss, I've had a look at the staff situation at {{team}} and wanted to flag a few things:

• A good Coach will significantly improve training effectiveness — your players will develop faster.
• A qualified Physio helps with injury prevention and speeds up recovery between matches.
• Our Scouts can help identify transfer targets and assess opponents.

I'd strongly recommend filling any vacancies before the season starts. You can find available staff in the Staff section.

Check it out when you get a chance.

boardExpect.subject: {{team}} — Season Objectives
boardExpect.body:
The board has set the following expectations for this season:

• Finish in the top half of the table
• Maintain financial stability
• Develop young talent from the academy

Meeting these objectives will strengthen your position. Failure to meet minimum expectations may result in a review of your tenure.

We trust in your abilities.

boardObjectives.subject: Season {{season}} — Board Objectives
boardObjectives.body:
The board has set the following objectives for this season:

1. Finish in the top {{expectedPos}}
2. Win at least {{winTarget}} matches
3. Score at least {{goalsTarget}} goals
4. Keep wage spending at or below {{financeTarget}}% of the budget

Meeting these targets will improve the board's confidence in your management. Failure to meet expectations may result in reduced budgets or further consequences.

financeCritical.subject: URGENT: Club in Debt
financeCritical.body:
The club is currently €{{amount}} in debt. This is an unsustainable situation.

The board demands immediate action to address the financial crisis. Consider selling players, reducing staff, or finding alternative income.

Failure to resolve this may have serious consequences for your position.

financeWarning.subject: Financial Warning — Low Reserves
financeWarning.body:
Our financial reserves are running low. At the current burn rate (€{{weeklyWages}}/week in wages), we have approximately {{weeksLeft}} weeks of funding remaining.

I'd recommend reviewing the wage bill and exploring ways to boost income.

wageOverBudget.subject: Wage Bill Exceeds Budget
wageOverBudget.body:
Our annual wage bill (€{{annualWages}}) currently exceeds the allocated wage budget (€{{wageBudget}}).

While we can sustain this in the short term, the board would prefer to see the wage bill brought under control.

financeBoardPressure.subject: Board Review — Financial Pressure
financeBoardPressure.bodyWarning:
The board remains concerned about the club's finances. Confidence in your management has fallen by {{penalty}} points this week.

You need to improve the wage position and short-term cash outlook before patience wears thinner.
financeBoardPressure.bodyCritical:
The board has reviewed the club's worsening financial position and confidence in your management has fallen by {{penalty}} points this week.

Cash reserves and wage commitments are now in a critical state. Immediate corrective action is expected.

marketingCampaign.subject: Marketing Campaign Report
marketingCampaign.body:
The commercial push has finished with gross sales of €{{grossRevenue}}. After €{{campaignCost}} in campaign costs, the club banks €{{netIncome}} in fresh income.

The commercial team will need {{days}} days before launching another campaign.

seasonPayout.subject: Season {{season}} Prize Money Awarded
seasonPayout.body: The board has confirmed a prize payout of €{{amount}} for your {{position}}-place league finish. The amount has been added to the club balance.

body.champion:
Congratulations! {{team}} are league champions! What an incredible achievement.

The board is absolutely delighted with your performance. You finished on {{points}} points.

We look forward to defending the title next season.
body.topFour:
A solid season for {{team}}. You finished in {{position}}{{suffix}} place with {{points}} points.

The board is satisfied with the campaign. Let's push for the title next season.
body.midTable:
{{team}} finished the season in {{position}}{{suffix}} place with {{points}} points.

A mid-table finish. The board expects improvement next season. We need to be more competitive.
body.lowerHalf:
A disappointing season for {{team}}. Finishing {{position}}{{suffix}} with only {{points}} points is below expectations.

The board is concerned. Significant improvement will be needed next season, or your position may come under review.

newSeasonSchedule.subject: Season {{season}} — New Schedule Released
newSeasonSchedule.body:
The schedule for Season {{season}} has been released! The new campaign kicks off in 4 weeks.

Use this break to assess your squad, make any necessary changes, and prepare for the challenges ahead.

Good luck!

body.intense:
Boss, we have a serious fitness crisis. {{criticalCount}} players are in critical condition and at risk of injury:

{{players}}

Average squad fitness is at {{avgCondition}}%. With the current Intense schedule (6 days training), the squad is being pushed too hard. Switching to a Balanced schedule would give them recovery time.

If we push them further without rest, injuries are inevitable.
body.balanced:
Boss, we have a serious fitness crisis. {{criticalCount}} players are in critical condition and at risk of injury:

{{players}}

Average squad fitness is at {{avgCondition}}%. Even on a Balanced schedule, the squad needs attention. Consider switching to a Light schedule temporarily.

If we push them further without rest, injuries are inevitable.
body.light:
Boss, we have a serious fitness crisis. {{criticalCount}} players are in critical condition and at risk of injury:

{{players}}

Average squad fitness is at {{avgCondition}}%. The squad is already on a Light schedule — the issue may be high training intensity. Consider reducing intensity.

If we push them further without rest, injuries are inevitable.

body.intense:
Boss, the squad is looking tired. Average fitness is {{avgCondition}}% and {{exhaustedCount}} players are below 40% condition.

Switching to a Balanced schedule would give the squad more recovery time.

We should consider giving the lads some rest before the next match.
body.balanced:
Boss, the squad is looking tired. Average fitness is {{avgCondition}}% and {{exhaustedCount}} players are below 40% condition.

A Light schedule for a few days could help the squad bounce back.

We should consider giving the lads some rest before the next match.
body.light:
Boss, the squad is looking tired. Average fitness is {{avgCondition}}% and {{exhaustedCount}} players are below 40% condition.

The squad is already on a Light schedule, so recovery should come naturally. Just keep an eye on any particularly exhausted players.

We should consider giving the lads some rest before the next match.

encourage.label: Encourage them
encourage.description: Show empathy and encourage the player to keep working hard.

promiseTime.label: Promise more playing time
promiseTime.description: Tell them they'll get their chance — bigger morale boost but sets expectations.

workHarder.label: Tell them to work harder
workHarder.description: Tough love approach — could backfire or motivate them.

explain.label: Explain the situation
explain.description: Calmly explain squad competition and rotation. Steady morale boost.

promiseChance.label: Promise them a chance soon
promiseChance.description: They'll be happier but will expect to start in upcoming matches.

proveYourself.label: Tell them to prove themselves
proveYourself.description: Challenge them to earn their place. Risky — could motivate or frustrate.

praiseBack.label: Return the praise
praiseBack.description: Tell them how much you value their contribution.

stayProfessional.label: Stay professional
stayProfessional.description: Acknowledge their form but keep things measured.

higherExpectations.label: Set higher expectations
higherExpectations.description: Challenge them to reach an even higher level. Could push or pressure.

reassure.label: Reassure them about renewal
reassure.description: Tell them you want them to stay. Big morale boost.

noncommittal.label: Be noncommittal
noncommittal.description: Keep your options open. Player may become unsettled.

noRenewal.label: Tell them you won't renew
noRenewal.description: Honest but brutal. Morale will tank.

encourage.positive: Player feels a bit better. Morale {{delta}}

moraleCrisis.promiseTime: Player is reassured by the promise. Morale {{delta}}. They'll expect to start soon.

workHarder.negative: Player is offended by the tough love. Morale {{delta}}

benchComplaint.promiseChance: Player is excited about the opportunity. Morale {{delta}}. They expect to start next match.

proveYourself.positive: Player is fired up to prove their worth. Morale {{delta}}
proveYourself.negative: Player feels dismissed and insulted. Morale {{delta}}

happyPlayer.praiseBack: Player beams at the praise. Morale {{delta}}

higherExpectations.positive: Player rises to the challenge. Morale {{delta}}
higherExpectations.negative: Player feels the pressure is unfair. Morale {{delta}}

contractConcern.reassure: Player is reassured about their future. Morale {{delta}}

noncommittal.positive: Player grudgingly accepts for now. Morale {{delta}}
noncommittal.negative: Player is unsettled and unhappy. Morale {{delta}}

contractConcern.noRenewal: Player is devastated. Morale {{delta}}. They may affect the dressing room.
contractConcern.noRenewalWithDressingRoom: Player is devastated. Morale {{delta}}. They may affect the dressing room. The dressing room mood dips — {{affected}} teammates lose morale.

sponsor.subject: Sponsorship Offer — {{sponsor}}
sponsor.body:
Good news, boss! {{sponsor}} has expressed interest in becoming a sponsor of {{team}}.

They are offering a weekly payment of €{{amount}} over the next 12 weeks in exchange for advertising space at the training ground.

This seems like a reasonable deal, but it is your call.

decline.label: Decline politely
decline.description: Turn down the offer. No financial impact.

effects.accepted: Sponsorship deal signed! You will receive €{{amount}}/week for 12 weeks.

trainingInjury.subject: Injury — {{player}} ({{injury}})
trainingInjury.body0:
Bad news from the training ground. {{player}} has picked up a {{injury}} during today's session.

The medical team estimates {{days}} days on the sidelines. We'll monitor the recovery closely.
trainingInjury.body1:
Unfortunately, {{player}} went down in training today with a {{injury}}.

Initial assessment: out for approximately {{days}} days. We'll keep you updated on their progress.

mediaPositive.subject: Positive Press — {{player}}
mediaPositive.body:
The local papers are running a very positive piece on {{player}} today.

They are highlighting their excellent recent form and commitment to {{team}}. This kind of coverage is great for the player's confidence and the club's image.

mediaNegative.subject: Negative Press — {{player}}
mediaNegative.body:
Some unflattering coverage of {{player}} appeared in the tabloids today.

Journalists are questioning their form and commitment to {{team}}. This could affect the player's morale — you might want to have a word.

intlCallup.subject: International Call-Up — {{player}}
intlCallup.body:
{{player}} has been called up to the {{nationality}} national team for an upcoming international window.

This is a great honor for the player and reflects well on the club. They'll be in good spirits when they return, though keep an eye on their fatigue levels.

community.body0:
{{team}} hosted a community open day at the training ground today.

Fans got to meet the players and watch a training session. The atmosphere was fantastic and it's done wonders for team spirit.
community.body1:
Several first-team players from {{team}} volunteered for a youth coaching session at a local school.

Great PR for the club, and the players seem energized by the experience.
community.body2:
The club has organized a charity initiative in partnership with a local foundation.

{{team}} continues to build strong ties with the community. The board is pleased with the positive image.

moodReport.subject: Dressing Room Report — Mood: {{mood}}

boardConfidence.subject: Board Meeting — Results Under Scrutiny
boardConfidence.body0:
The board has called an urgent meeting. Three consecutive defeats have raised serious concerns about the team's direction.

"We need to see improvement quickly. The fans are restless and results must change."

How do you respond?
boardConfidence.body1:
After a string of poor results, the chairman has summoned you for a difficult conversation.

"We backed you with resources and time. The results simply aren't good enough. What's your plan?"

Choose your response carefully.

reassureBoard.label: Reassure them with a plan
reassureBoard.description: Present a clear strategy for turning things around. Buys you time.

acceptPressure.label: Accept responsibility
acceptPressure.description: Own the poor results. The board respects honesty.

blameCircumstances.label: Point to injuries and bad luck
blameCircumstances.description: Deflect blame to external factors. May or may not convince them.

effects.reassureBoard: You reassured the board. They'll give you more time for now.
effects.acceptPressure: You acknowledged the pressure. The board appreciates your honesty.
effects.blameCircumstances: The board isn't entirely convinced by excuses, but they'll wait and see.

fanPetition.subject1: Fan Petition — Give Youth a Chance
fanPetition.body0:
A group of {{team}} supporters has organized a petition calling for more attacking football.

"We pay good money to watch exciting football. We want to see the team go forward and entertain us!"

Over 500 signatures so far. How do you respond?
fanPetition.body1:
Supporters of {{team}} have started a campaign urging you to give more opportunities to young players from the academy.

"The future of our club depends on developing homegrown talent. Stop overlooking the kids!"

It's getting traction on social media. What's your response?
fanPetition.body2:
An open letter from the {{team}} Supporters Trust has been published, asking for more transparency from the management.

"We want to understand the club's vision. Where are we heading? What's the long-term plan?"

The local press is covering it. How do you handle this?

listenFans.label: Engage with the fans
listenFans.description: Meet with fan representatives and listen to their concerns. Good for morale.

ignoreFans.label: Focus on football
ignoreFans.description: Politely decline — football decisions stay in the dressing room.

addressPublicly.label: Make a public statement
addressPublicly.description: Address the petition in a press conference. Transparent and proactive.

effects.listenFans: You engaged with the fans. Squad morale improved slightly.
effects.ignoreFans: You decided to focus on football matters. The fans are a little disappointed.
effects.addressPublicly: Your public address was well received. Fan confidence is up.

rivalInterest.subject: Transfer Rumour — {{player}} linked with {{rival}}
rivalInterest.body0:
We've received word that {{rival}} have been making enquiries about {{player}}.

Their scouts were spotted at our last few matches, and our sources suggest they may approach with a formal offer soon.

How would you like us to respond if they make contact?
rivalInterest.body1:
The press are reporting that {{player}} is a target for {{rival}}.

According to sources, the player has attracted attention after their recent performances. No formal bid yet, but it's only a matter of time.

What's your stance?

notForSale.label: Not for sale
notForSale.description: Make it clear the player is going nowhere. Boosts their morale.

openToOffers.label: Open to offers
openToOffers.description: Signal willingness to negotiate. Player may become unsettled.

noComment.label: No comment
noComment.description: Stay quiet and let things play out. Neutral stance.

effects.notForSale: You made it clear the player is not for sale. They're feeling valued.
effects.openToOffers: You indicated you'd listen to offers. The player is unsettled.
effects.noComment: No comment. The rumour mill continues...

moraleCrisis.subject: {{player}} — Morale Crisis
moraleCrisis.body0:
Boss, {{player}} has asked for a private meeting. They seem really down lately and want to talk about their situation at the club.

Their morale is at {{morale}} — you should address this before it affects the dressing room.
moraleCrisis.body1:
{{player}} has been looking dejected in training. They've requested a chat with you about their current state of mind.

Morale: {{morale}}. How you handle this could make or break their confidence.

benchComplaint.subject: {{player}} — Wants More Game Time
benchComplaint.body0:
Boss, {{player}} has come to see you. They're frustrated about their lack of game time in recent matches and want to know what they need to do to get back in the team.

"I feel like I've been training well, but I'm not getting a chance to show it on the pitch."
benchComplaint.body1:
{{player}} knocked on your office door looking unhappy. They haven't featured in the last few matches and want answers.

"I came to this club to play football. If I'm not in your plans, I'd rather you tell me straight."

happyPlayer.subject: {{player}} — Feeling Great
happyPlayer.body0:
{{player}} stopped by your office with a big smile. They're feeling great about their form and the team's direction.

"Just wanted to say I'm really enjoying my football right now, boss. The mood in the dressing room is fantastic."
happyPlayer.body1:
Your assistant mentions that {{player}} has been in excellent spirits lately. They approached you after training.

"Boss, I'm loving every minute here. Keep things going like this and I'll run through walls for you."

contractConcern.subject: {{player}} — Contract Running Down
contractConcern.body0:
{{player}} has approached you regarding their contract situation. With only {{days}} days remaining on their deal, they want to know where they stand.

"Boss, my contract is running down. I need to know if I'm part of your plans going forward or if I should start looking elsewhere."
contractConcern.body1:
Your assistant flags that {{player}}'s contract expires in roughly {{months}} month(s). The player has been asking around the dressing room about their future.

It might be wise to have a conversation before they become unsettled — or before other clubs start circling.

takeoverContractReview.subject: Assistant Manager - Contract Review
takeoverContractReview.bodyNoneUrgent:
Your assistant has reviewed the squad contracts after your arrival. {{totalExpiring}} player(s) are due to come up for renewal this season, but none require an immediate decision today.

Start mapping out who you want to keep so the situation stays under control.
takeoverContractReview.bodyUrgent:
Your assistant has reviewed the squad contracts after your arrival. {{totalExpiring}} player(s) are due to come up for renewal this season, and {{urgentContracts}} already need attention inside the next six months.

You do not need to solve everything at once, but these cases should be near the top of your early workload.
takeoverContractReview.bodyFinalMonth:
Your assistant has reviewed the squad contracts after your arrival. {{totalExpiring}} player(s) are due to come up for renewal this season, {{urgentContracts}} need attention inside the next six months, and {{finalMonthContracts}} are already in the final month.

Stabilize the urgent cases first, then work through the wider renewal list in stages.

contractExpired.subject: {{player}} Leaves on a Free
contractExpired.body: {{player}} has left {{team}} after their contract expired. The player is now a free agent.

contractTerminated.subject: {{player}} Released
contractTerminated.body: {{player}} has been released by {{team}}. The club paid {{severance}} in remaining wages as severance.

delegatedRenewals.subject: Assistant Report — Contract Renewals
delegatedRenewals.body: Boss, I went through our renewal list at {{team}}. {{successes}} completed, {{stalled}} still pending, {{failures}} failed.

notes.managerBlocked: You told me not to reopen contract talks yet.
notes.completed: I was able to close this one without needing you to step in.
notes.beyondLimits: Their camp want around {{wage}}/wk for {{years}} years, which is beyond the delegation limits.
notes.boardWagePolicy: Board wage policy blocks this renewal. Keep annual wages near {{budget}} while we recover.
notes.prefersManager: They would listen, but they still want about {{wage}}/wk for {{years}} years and prefer to hear from you directly.
notes.relationshipBlocked: They are not willing to commit through me under the current relationship and contract situation.

youthRecruitmentReport.subject: Scout Report — Youth Recruitment
youthRecruitmentReport.bodyAny:
{{scout}} has completed the latest youth recruitment search for {{team}}. I found {{count}} prospects in the {{regionLabel}} market with a {{objectiveLabel}} profile.

Review the attached cards and decide who should join the academy.
youthRecruitmentReport.bodyTargeted:
{{scout}} has completed the latest youth recruitment search for {{team}}. I found {{count}} prospects in the {{regionLabel}} market with a {{objectiveLabel}} profile, focused on {{targetLabel}}.

Review the attached cards and decide who should join the academy.

sign.label: Sign to academy
sign.description: Offer this prospect a youth contract and add them to the academy.

shortlist.label: Shortlist
shortlist.description: Keep this prospect under consideration and move them into a separate shortlist message.

discard.label: Discard
discard.description: Pass on this prospect and remove them from the report.

effect.sign: {{player}} signed a youth contract and joined your academy.
effect.shortlist: {{player}} was added to your youth shortlist.
effect.discard: {{player}} was removed from the youth recruitment report.

youthRecruitmentShortlist.subject: Youth prospect shortlisted
youthRecruitmentShortlist.body: {{player}} has been moved to your youth shortlist. You can review them again later before making a final decision.

scoutReport.subject: Scout Report: {{player}}
scoutReport.body: Your scout {{scout}} has completed their assessment of {{player}}. Full report available in the scouting section.

boardWarning.subject: Board Concern — Performance Review
boardWarning.body: The board is growing increasingly concerned with recent results at {{team}}. Your position will come under serious review if there is no improvement in the near future.

boardFinalWarning.subject: Final Warning — Immediate Improvement Required
boardFinalWarning.body: This is your final warning. The board at {{team}} has lost patience with the current run of results. Unless there is an immediate and significant improvement, we will have no choice but to consider your position.

boardFired.subject: Notice of Dismissal — {{team}}
boardFired.body: The board of directors at {{team}} has decided to relieve you of your duties as manager, effective immediately. We thank you for your service and wish you well in your future career.

jobOffer.subject: Managerial Vacancy — {{team}}
jobOffer.body:
The board at {{team}} ({{city}}) is looking for a new manager to lead the club forward. Last season finish: {{league_position}}.

After reviewing your credentials, we believe you could be the right fit. Would you be interested in taking on this challenge?

effects.accepted: You have been appointed manager of {{team}}
effects.alreadyEmployed: You are already employed and cannot accept the offer from {{team}}
effects.unavailable: The offer from {{team}} is no longer available because the position has been filled
effects.failed: Could not accept the offer from {{team}}

jobOfferExpired.subject: Position Filled — {{team}}
jobOfferExpired.body: The vacancy at {{team}} has now been filled, so this offer is no longer available.

jobHired.subject: Welcome to {{team}}
jobHired.body: The board of directors at {{team}} is delighted to welcome you as the new manager. We look forward to working with you and achieving great things together.

jobRejection.subject: Application Update — {{team}}
jobRejection.body: Thank you for your interest in the managerial position at {{team}}. After careful consideration, we have decided to pursue other candidates. We wish you the best in your future career.

transferComplete.subject: Transfer Complete: {{player}}
transferComplete.body:
The transfer of {{player}} has been completed for a fee of {{fee}}.

The player has joined the squad and is available for selection.

transferOffer.subject: Incoming Offer for {{player}}
transferOffer.body: {{team}} have submitted an offer of {{fee}} for {{player}}. Review the bid in the Transfers tab to accept or reject it.

matchReport.body0:
In Matchday {{matchday}} action, the match ended {{home}} {{homeGoals}} - {{awayGoals}} {{away}}. The result could have implications on the league standings as the season progresses.

Goals: {{scorers}}
matchReport.body1:
The match ended {{home}} {{homeGoals}} - {{awayGoals}} {{away}} in a Matchday {{matchday}} clash. Both sides gave their all in an engaging contest.

Goals: {{scorers}}
matchReport.body2:
Matchday {{matchday}} delivered another exciting encounter as {{home}} faced {{away}} ({{homeGoals}}-{{awayGoals}}). The fans were treated to a competitive fixture.

Goals: {{scorers}}
matchReport.body0.noScorers: In Matchday {{matchday}} action, the match ended {{home}} {{homeGoals}} - {{awayGoals}} {{away}}. The result could have implications on the league standings as the season progresses.
matchReport.body1.noScorers: The match ended {{home}} {{homeGoals}} - {{awayGoals}} {{away}} in a Matchday {{matchday}} clash. Both sides gave their all in an engaging contest.
matchReport.body2.noScorers: Matchday {{matchday}} delivered another exciting encounter as {{home}} faced {{away}} ({{homeGoals}}-{{awayGoals}}). The fans were treated to a competitive fixture.

reportFriendly.title: {{home}} {{homeGoals}} - {{awayGoals}} {{away}}: Friendly report
reportFriendly.body: In friendly action, {{home}} {{homeGoals}} - {{awayGoals}} {{away}}. Both sides used the fixture to build sharpness before the competitive campaign.{{scorersSection}}

reportPreseason.title: {{home}} {{homeGoals}} - {{awayGoals}} {{away}}: Preseason tournament report
reportPreseason.body: In preseason tournament action, {{home}} {{homeGoals}} - {{awayGoals}} {{away}}. Both sides used the fixture to build sharpness before the competitive campaign.{{scorersSection}}

roundup.headline0: Matchday {{matchday}} Round-Up: {{totalGoals}} Goals in Action-Packed Day
roundup.headline1: Premier Division Matchday {{matchday}}: All the Results
roundup.biggestWinnerLine: {{biggestWinner}} recorded the biggest win of the day.

seasonPreview.headline0: Season Preview: {{teamCount}} Teams Battle for Glory
seasonPreview.headline1: Premier Division Season Set to Begin
seasonPreview.headline2: Can {{favourite}} Claim the Title? Season Preview
seasonPreview.body:
The Premier Division is set to kick off with {{teamCount}} teams vying for the title.

Pre-season predictions have {{favourite}} as the early favourites, but {{darkHorse}} could be the dark horse to watch this campaign.

With new managers taking the reins at some clubs, this season promises to be one of the most competitive in recent memory. Every point will matter as the race for the title heats up.

Teams: {{teamList}}

managerialChange.headline: {{team}} sack {{manager}}
managerialChange.body: {{team}} have dismissed {{manager}} after a damaging run of results, leaving the club searching for a new manager.

managerialAppointment.headline: {{team}} appoint {{manager}}
managerialAppointment.body: {{team}} have appointed {{manager}} as their new manager after moving quickly to fill the vacancy at the club.

majorTransfer.headline: {{player}} Completes Move to {{toTeam}}
majorTransfer.body: {{toTeam}} have completed the signing of {{player}} from {{fromTeam}} for {{fee}}.

transferRoundup.headline: Transfer Roundup — Week of {{weekStart}}
transferRoundup.body:
The transfer market stayed busy this week. {{transferCount}} completed deal(s) stood out across the division.

{{deals}}

seasonAwards.headline: Season {{season}} Awards
seasonAwards.bodyBoth: Season {{season}} concluded with {{goldenBootWinner}} ({{goldenBootTeam}}) lifting the Golden Boot with {{goldenBootGoals}} goals. Player of the Year went to {{potyWinner}} ({{potyTeam}}) with an average rating of {{potyRating}}.
seasonAwards.bodyGoldenBootOnly: Season {{season}} closed with {{goldenBootWinner}} ({{goldenBootTeam}}) crowned top scorer with {{goldenBootGoals}} goals.
seasonAwards.bodyPotyOnly: Season {{season}} ended with {{potyWinner}} ({{potyTeam}}) named Player of the Year, posting an average rating of {{potyRating}}.

weeklyDigest.headline: Weekly Digest — Week of {{weekStart}}
weeklyDigest.bodyNoTopScorer: The latest weekly digest is here. {{leader}} lead the table, and {{storylineCount}} storyline(s) are shaping the division this week.
weeklyDigest.bodyWithTopScorer: The latest weekly digest is here. {{leader}} lead the table, while {{topScorer}} heads the scoring charts with {{topScorerGoals}} goal(s). {{storylineCount}} storyline(s) are shaping the division this week.

preseasonDigest.headline: Preseason Digest — Week of {{weekStart}}
preseasonDigest.bodyNoResults: The latest preseason digest is here. Training camps, selection decisions, and transfer business continue across the division as clubs prepare for opening day.{{unbeatenLine}}

titleRace.headline: Title Race Tightens — {{leader}} Lead {{challenger}} by {{gap}} Point(s)
titleRace.body: {{leader}} remain in front, but {{challenger}} are only {{gap}} point(s) behind as the title race takes shape.

unbeatenStreak.headline: {{team}} Extend Unbeaten Run to {{runLength}}
unbeatenStreak.body: {{team}} have gone {{runLength}} match(es) without defeat and are building real momentum.

transferRumour.headline1: Clubs Circle as {{player}}'s Future Remains Uncertain
transferRumour.body0: Sources close to the situation suggest that {{player}} could be on the move, with multiple clubs reportedly monitoring the {{team}} player. {{team}} have not commented publicly, but the speculation is unlikely to die down soon.
transferRumour.body1: {{player}} is understood to have attracted attention from clubs across the division. The {{team}} star has been one of the standout performers this season, and it is believed that offers could materialise before the window closes.
transferRumour.body2: Transfer whispers are growing louder around {{player}}, with the {{team}} player said to be weighing their options. Agent talks are rumoured to have taken place, though nothing has been confirmed.

injuryNews.headline1: {{player}} Set for Spell on the Sidelines
injuryNews.body0Days: {{team}} have confirmed that {{player}} has picked up an injury and is expected to be sidelined for {{daysOut}} day(s). The club will assess the situation before providing a further update.
injuryNews.body0Weeks: {{team}} have confirmed that {{player}} has picked up an injury and is expected to be sidelined for around {{weeksOut}} week(s). The club will assess the situation before providing a further update.
injuryNews.body1Days: {{player}} suffered a setback in training, with the {{team}} player ruled out for {{daysOut}} day(s). The absence will be a significant blow as the season reaches a critical stage.
injuryNews.body1Weeks: {{player}} suffered a setback in training, with the {{team}} player ruled out for around {{weeksOut}} week(s). The absence will be a significant blow as the season reaches a critical stage.

pressConference.bodySingle:
The {{team}} manager spoke briefly after the {{result}} result.

"{{quote}}"
pressConference.bodyNone: The {{team}} manager declined to speak at length after the {{result}} result.

AerialDominance.label: Aerial Dom.
AerialDominance.desc: Commands the box in the air

sacked.title: You've Been Sacked
sacked.subtitle: The board has lost confidence in your ability to manage the club.
sacked.dismissalLetter:
The board of directors has decided to relieve you of your duties as manager of {{team}}, effective immediately.

We thank you for your service and wish you well in your future career.

Yours sincerely,
The Board of Directors
